LanguageData.ZIR_EventDriven: Requires active training — no passive gain at this stage.
LanguageData.ZIR_RecoveryMoment_Text: {0} has worked hard enough to reclaim a piece of themselves. They are beginning to recover from their {1} regression.
LanguageData.ZIR_PottySchedule_Tip: Assign {0} to run a potty training session.
LanguageData.ZIR_PottySchedule_Cooldown: Last session was recent. Ready in {0}.
LanguageData.ZIR_PottySchedule_NoCaretaker: No colonist with Childcare work is available.
LanguageData.ZIR_PottySchedule_NoFixture: No potty chair or toilet in range.
LanguageData.ZIR_PottyScheduled: {0} will take {1} for a potty training session.
LanguageData.ZIR_PottyTooltip_NeedsCaretaker: Requires a caretaker with Childcare work enabled. Using the toilet improves bladder control and aids recovery.
LanguageData.ZIR_PottyTooltip_SelfTrain: Going to the toilet independently builds control and feeds the learning chain. Accidents set it back.
LanguageData.ZIR_RecoveryDialog_Desc: {0} has earned a recovery moment. Choose a skill passion to reclaim, and optionally a new trait.
